pi_items.source: Task description and field validation in verifier.py (line 39); realistic event name format for organic certification inspections in France
Task description specifies September 20, 2024; consistent with ISO 8601 date format used in Ekylibre; realistic inspection date in autumn/harvest season for French organic farms
Task description specifies 09:00; standard time format for event scheduling; realistic for morning farm inspection start time
Task description specifies 12:00; provides 3-hour duration for inspection, which is realistic for a comprehensive farm organic certification audit

Web search confirmed GAEC JOULIN is a real agricultural cooperative (Groupement Agricole d'Exploitation en Commun) located at Saint-Porchaire, Charente-Maritime, France. Confirmed as the source farm for Ekylibre's first_run-demo database. See: https://gaecjoulin.wordpress.com/, https://www.societe.com/societe/joulin-326273729.html

Web search confirmed Ecocert is a legitimate, major organic certification body founded in France in 1991. Ecocert certifies approximately 70% of the organic food industry in France and 30% worldwide. Authorized to certify Agriculture Biologique (AB) standard. See: https://www.ecocert.com/en-US/expertise/organic-farming, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ECOCERT

Ekylibre Event model (https://github.com/ekylibre/ekylibre) establishes default nature of :meeting; verifier.py accepts 'meeting', 'reunion', or 'réunion' as valid values; task description explicitly states Nature: Meeting (Réunion) in French context

pi_items.metadata_value: Siège exploitation - GAEC JOULIN in manifest reflects farm address
pi_items.verified_value: 8 rue du bouil bleu, 17250 SAINT-PORCHAIRE, France
pi_items.source: Ekylibre first_run-demo manifest.yml confirms GAEC JOULIN location; French business records (SIRET 32627372900011); web sources confirm Charente-Maritime location

pi_items.metadata_value: Task references annual inspection documentation (registre parcellaire, cahier de traçabilité, semences bio, plan de fumure)
pi_items.verified_value: Annual inspections are standard practice for French organic certification bodies; documentation requirements are consistent with EU organic regulation
pi_items.source: Web search results from agriculture.gouv.fr and INAO confirm annual audit requirement for organic certification in France. See: https://agriculture.gouv.fr/la-certification-en-agriculture-biologique

privileged_info_summary: The create_farm_event task requires an agent to create a new calendar event in Ekylibre representing an annual organic certification (Agriculture Biologique) inspection by Ecocert at GAEC JOULIN farm. All metadata claims are verified as accurate: GAEC JOULIN is a real French farm cooperative in Charente-Maritime; Ecocert is a legitimate major organic certifier in France; the event details (September 20, 2024, 09:00-12:00, meeting type) are realistic for a farm inspection; the required documentation (crop register, input traceability log, organic seed receipts, fertilization plan) reflects actual French organic certification audit requirements. The event itself is synthetic task data but grounded in real agricultural domain knowledge and the genuine Ekylibre demo dataset.
